query:
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, questionOrder) VALUES
(690001, 'How many books are in the Protestant Old Testament canon?', 'multiple_choice', '["27 books", "39 books", "46 books", "66 books"]', '39 books', 1),
(690001, 'What are the four major divisions of the Old Testament?', 'multiple_choice', '["Gospels, Acts, Epistles, Revelation", "Torah, Historical, Wisdom, Prophetic", "Law, Psalms, Proverbs, Prophets", "Genesis, Exodus, Leviticus, Numbers"]', 'Torah, Historical, Wisdom, Prophetic', 2),
(690001, 'Which language was the Old Testament primarily written in?', 'multiple_choice', '["Greek", "Latin", "Hebrew", "Aramaic only"]', 'Hebrew', 3),
(690001, 'The first five books of the Bible are called:', 'multiple_choice', '["The Gospels", "The Pentateuch/Torah", "The Epistles", "The Wisdom Books"]', 'The Pentateuch/Torah', 4),
(690001, 'Which of the following is NOT a book in the Wisdom Literature section?', 'multiple_choice', '["Job", "Psalms", "Isaiah", "Proverbs"]', 'Isaiah', 5),
(690001, 'According to 2 Timothy 3:16-17, Scripture is described as:', 'multiple_choice', '["Man-made and historical", "God-breathed and useful", "Optional for believers", "Only for scholars"]', 'God-breathed and useful', 6),
(690001, 'The Historical Books chronicle Israel''s history from:', 'multiple_choice', '["Creation to the flood", "Abraham to Moses", "Joshua through Esther", "Matthew to Revelation"]', 'Joshua through Esther', 7),
(690001, 'What is a key theological theme of the Old Testament?', 'multiple_choice', '["God as Creator and Redeemer", "Salvation by works alone", "God is distant and uninvolved", "Human self-sufficiency"]', 'God as Creator and Redeemer', 8),
(690001, 'The Major Prophets include all EXCEPT:', 'multiple_choice', '["Isaiah", "Jeremiah", "Ezekiel", "Amos"]', 'Amos', 9),
(690001, 'In Luke 24:44, Jesus affirmed the authority of:', 'multiple_choice', '["Only the Gospels", "The Law, Prophets, and Psalms", "Greek philosophy", "Roman law"]', 'The Law, Prophets, and Psalms', 10),
(690001, 'Explain why the Old Testament is essential for understanding the Christian faith and how it points to Jesus Christ.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'The Old Testament provides the foundation for understanding God''s redemptive plan, prophecies about the Messiah, and the covenant relationship that finds fulfillment in Jesus Christ.', 11);
